subject: Project pulse: launch execution in South Europe | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-4029
body: Please note the launch stream in South Europe has shifted to a tighter timeline. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Background context draws on methods associated with Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-4029. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: drop-bears, delivery.
